overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from a cyberpunk-style video game, descending a concrete stairwell adorned with digital billboards before emerging into a neon-lit urban plaza at night. The scene features vibrant cyan and magenta neon lighting reflecting off wet pavement, with towering buildings covered in large digital advertisements.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered concrete stairwell with digital billboards

agents.ego_description: descending a concrete staircase surrounded by graffiti-covered walls and illuminated by neon digital billboards

entered.detail: wide concrete stairs with metal railings descending between tall walls
metal handrail running along the left side of the staircase
metal handrail running along the right side of the staircase
large vertical digital display showing a woman with blue hair and glowing red eyes
vertical digital advertisement with pink and purple graphics
concrete wall covered in graffiti and posters

segments.scene_description: The segment shows a first-person descent down a concrete staircase in a cyberpunk urban environment. The narrow enclosed space features metal railings on both sides and graffiti-covered concrete walls. Digital billboards provide the primary light source, including a prominent display of a blue-haired woman ahead and a pink advertisement to the left.

scene_state.functional_zone: neon-lit urban plaza with digital advertisements

events.description: exits the covered stairwell into the open urban plaza
stops descending stairs and begins walking forward on flat wet pavement

agents.ego_description: walking through a wet neon-lit plaza surrounded by towering buildings with large digital billboards and cyan neon lighting

entered.detail: wet paved tiles reflecting the neon lights from surrounding buildings
tall building with horizontal purple neon light strips
tall street lamp illuminating the plaza
large horizontal digital billboard on top of building showing advertisements
building facade with bright cyan neon signage
red and black vending machines against the wall

segments.scene_description: The camera exits the stairwell into a wide-open urban plaza at night. The wet pavement reflects the vibrant cyan and purple neon lights from the surrounding cyberpunk architecture. Large digital billboards adorn the buildings, and the camera moves forward through the empty plaza, passing a street lamp and approaching buildings with glowing signage.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person descent from a claustrophobic concrete stairwell into a sprawling, neon-lit urban plaza at night. It begins by moving down a narrow enclosed staircase, where graffiti-covered walls and metal railings are illuminated by the glow of digital billboards featuring a blue-haired woman and pink advertisements. As the camera reaches the bottom, the confined space opens abruptly into a wide plaza with wet pavement that reflects vibrant cyan and purple light. The scene then expands as the camera glides forward through the empty square, passing a street lamp and moving toward towering buildings adorned with glowing signage and massive digital displays.
